�新 New (Posted: June 23, 2026)

AI summary (see the source article for accurate details)

This program helps single-parent households in Hanno City by subsidizing the initial guarantee fee when entering into a child support guarantee contract with a guarantee company.

Eligibility: You must receive child support allowance (児童扶養手当) or have equivalent income, be supporting children under age 20, have a child support guarantee contract for 1 year or longer, and never have received this subsidy before.

Subsidy amount: The lesser of (a) eligible expenses, (b) monthly child support amount, or (c) ¥50,000.

Application deadline: Within 6 months from the day after the date the notarized deed (公正証書) or equivalent document was created.

Submit to the Children's Support Section (こども支援課) with your application form and copies of:
• Child support allowance certificate
• Child support agreement document
• Receipt
• Guarantee contract

Receipts must include: payee name/address, date of receipt, amount, details of transaction, recipient's name/address, and official receipt stamp.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kodomoshienbu/kodomoshienka/13750.html
summary: ℹ️ Child Support Guarantee Contract Promotion Subsidy
